## Validation

## Constitution / Governance Checks
- [ ] No cross-client leakage path introduced
- [ ] Project boundary enforcement preserved
- [ ] UI does not directly access filesystem or model APIs
- [ ] Storage access remains through approved abstractions

## PR Definition of Done
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits
- [ ] Scope is clear and minimally sufficient
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Required CI checks pass
- [ ] Docs updated (`CHANGELOG.md` and relevant docs)
- [ ] Security/policy impact documented
- [ ] Reviewer comments resolved
